use_cases: Animated hero headlines with flowing gradient effects to capture user attention
Landing page subheadings with customizable color bands and wave motion
Emphasis text with scroll-triggered animations using IntersectionObserver
Brand typography with pause/resume controls for user-initiated interaction
Visual accent text with radial or linear gradient modes and configurable band counts
ai_summary: A text component that renders animated gradient waves across text characters using requestAnimationFrame for smooth motion. Features customizable color palettes, configurable band counts and gaps, scroll-triggered animations via IntersectionObserver, and support for repeat/single-play modes. Includes mouse event handlers and accessibility support through aria-label, making it suitable for eye-catching hero sections and landing page typography.
